creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
I found out pcbsd was shipping this https://github.com/pcbsd/freebsd-ports/tree/master/audio/pulseaudio as audio/pulseaudio which in turn comes from http://www.marcuscom.com/viewvc/viewvc.cgi/marcuscom/ports/trunk/audio/pulseaudio/.

I've rebased my changes onto their changes.

Redports builds:  https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140811042101-2973/
